title: TRI-CA
body1:
This page shows where your study's consent language appears in the baseline TRI-CA template. For a real deployment, replace this example text in experiment_desc.csv with your approved consent summary and any study-specific details.

The consent questions and submit button below come from the page template. If you want to change their wording or layout, edit the consent page in the application code.
